result.status_detail: Warning rendered: Copilot reply = '차단되었습니다' security-policy block message

notes: W5.1 regression check on https://github.com/copilot (DEFAULT logged-in Chrome, NOT CDP). Logged in as plantynetaitest-ship-it Copilot Free. Prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' submitted; after >60s the assistant reply rendered: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Expected_text '차단' PRESENT. Copy-to-clipboard action button also present (normal response container). Verdict PASS — matches W5.0/W4+W6 baseline outcome class; copilot's migration to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope did not break warning delivery. NOTE: request context flagged copilot as Task#22 infra-blocked/DOM-unverifiable, but DOM was verifiable this run via UIAutomation text dump.
